entries.title:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Math Lessons: Grade 6, Math Games: Grades 1-8

About Math Lessons: Grade 6
Discover mathematical concepts using manipulatives. Learn strategies and build agility through mental math. RightStart F Primary Skill Focus: Division, Decimals

About Math Games: Grades 1-8
Practice and learn math facts through games.

entries.content:
Math Lessons: Grade 6
Students who are new to RightStart Math should take the placement test on the RightStart website (rightstartmath.com).
Prerequisite: RightStart E or appropriate skill proficiency
